subject: Marlene, a young girl from Final Fantasy VII, depicted in chibi style holding a white flower with a joyful expression
description: A chibi-style illustration of a small young girl with brown hair in a pink short-sleeved outfit with an orange bow at the collar. She holds up a white daisy-like flower in her right hand with a big open-mouthed smile, radiating cheerful energy. The art style is simplified and expressive, reminiscent of official FFVII chibi designs. The card oracle text explicitly names Marlene alongside Aerith, Cloud, Tifa, and Barret, confirming this is the FFVII character. The background is minimal — cream/ivory card art space. The palette is warm pinks, browns, and white.
foreground: Chibi young girl in pink outfit holding a white flower, joyful smile
emotion: Pure joy; wide open-mouth smile, flower raised high, celebratory posture
